caption:
母亲的爱，
总藏在那些最平凡却最温柔的瞬间里。🌷

一句叮咛、一顿热饭、一次等待，
都是岁月里最无声却深刻的陪伴。

在这个特别的日子里，
多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会 
祝全天下的母亲，母亲节快乐 🤍

愿所有温柔，都被温柔以待。

A mother’s love is often quiet,
yet it becomes the gentlest strength throughout our lives. 🌸

This Mother’s Day,
Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) 
wishes every mother a day filled with love, warmth, and happiness. 🤍
ownerFullName: 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会

caption:
有时候，我们总习惯把一天排得很满，
功课、截止日期、会议、待办事项一项接一项，
好似一停下来，就会被落下。

但今天，也许可以换一种节奏。
把那些“必须完成”的事情，先轻轻放一放。
让自己慢一点，不用时刻保持在运转状态。

功课可以晚一点再写，工作也可以稍后再处理。
世界不会因为你今天休息一下就失去秩序。
偶尔的松弛，其实也是在为接下来的日子留出一点空间。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会在此祝大家五一劳动节愉快，愿你在忙与闲之间，找到属于自己的节奏，在该努力的时候投入，也在该休息的时候，安心放松。

Sometimes, we get used to filling every part of our day —
assignments, deadlines, meetings, and endless to-do lists,
as if slowing down means falling behind.

But perhaps today, you can take a different pace.
Set aside those “must-do” tasks for a while,
and allow yourself to move a little slower, without constantly staying switched on.

Your assignments can wait a little, and work can be picked up later.
The world will not fall out of place just because you chose to rest today.
Sometimes, giving yourself space is exactly what helps you go further.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes you a pleasant Labour Day. May you find your own rhythm between busyness and stillness — giving your best when it matters, and truly resting when it doesn’t.
ownerFullName: 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会

caption:
第二十九届会员福利 · 别再白白错过啦

你该不会真的只在报名活动的时候，才想起那张会员卡吧？
其实它更常出现在你吃饭、买饮料、日常走走停停的那些瞬间里。从校园内到校外，一点点被用掉的小优惠，慢慢就会变成你大学生活里最真实的“加分项”。

会员福利从来不只是活动优惠，它更像是一种默默陪你过日子的存在。
当你开始习惯带上它，你就会发现，这张卡比想象中更值得，也更常被用到。

福利有效期限：6/4/2026 - 12/3/2027
至于有哪些好康——就在海报上等你解锁，记得带上那张属于你的会员卡。👀

如有任何疑问，请联络：
谢紫欣 017-8724229

29th Membership Benefits · Don’t Let It Go to Waste

You're not just remembering your membership card when signing up for events… right? Honestly, it actually shows up way more in your everyday life — meals, drinks, and those little in-between moments around campus and beyond.

Those small perks might not seem like much at first, but they quietly add up and make your uni life a little smoother. Membership benefits aren’t just about events — they’re something you’ll find yourself using more often than you expected.

Benefit Validity: 6/4/2026 – 12/3/2027
Curious what’s included? It’s already on the poster; just don’t forget to bring your card along. 👀

For any inquiries, please contact:
Chia Zhi Sin 017-8724229
ownerFullName: 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会

caption:
你做的每一个选择，
真的，是你自己选的吗？

当人生来到分岔路——
你是遵从内心，
还是迫于形势跟随他人的声音中作出选择?

这不是一场普通的密室。 
这是一场关于「选择」的实验。

而这一次， 
你不是玩家——
你是创造者。

🗝️ 密室筹委招募中 
内务副主席｜外务副主席｜秘书｜副秘书｜财政｜节目｜场地｜创设｜宣传与媒体｜赞助

无论你是否有筹办经验，
只要你有热情、有责任感，
也愿意在团队中发光发热✨

📩 报名加入我们，一起打造一个不一样的密室～
报名截止日期：10/05/2026（星期日）
点击链接/扫码即可报名❤️
https://forms.gle/ejRynQK5T2RcMfyy9

☎️如有任何疑问，请联络:
廖侱宇 017-643 8185
叶子瑄 011-1099 4648
官珮颖 016-622 8526
赖铃巧 011-3666 0133
陈欣纹 017-942 0100

Are the choices you make…
truly your own?

When life reaches a crossroads—
will you follow your heart,
or be shaped by circumstances and the voices around you?

This is not just an escape room.
This is an experiment about “choice.”

And this time—
You are not the player.
You are the creator.

🗝️ Escape Room Organising Committee Recruitment Now Open Positions available: 
Vice Chairperson of External Affairs | Vice Chairperson of Internal Affairs | Secretariat | Treasurer | Programme | Logistics | Publicity & Media | Design | Sponsorship

No experience? That’s okay. 
As long as you have passion, a sense of responsibility,
and the willingness to shine as part of a team. ✨

📩 Join us and help create something truly different. 
Application deadline: 10 May 2026 (Sunday)
Click the link / scan the QR code to apply ❤️
